title: Favoriting Photos
drDigitalIntro:
Favoriting marks a photo with a heart.
• The photo stays in your library and joins a Favorites section.
• Click the heart to add it; click again to remove it.
• With hundreds of photos, Favorites gathers the ones you love most.

steps.say: Click the Beach Vacation photo to open it.
Click the heart button to add it to your Favorites.
Click Back, then open the Dog at the Park photo.
Go to the Favorites section in the sidebar to see your favorited photos.

drDigitalSuccess: Your favorite photos are saved in one place! The heart icon marks your best shots.
drDigitalHint: Click a photo first to open it, then click the heart button that appears.
